svg.text: MdI ✓ . Principle 1 (v1.0 §4) mandates LLM-free evaluation; writer and reader are the structural pipeline, not a model.
[8] Samuel Sameer Tanguturi. ATANT: An evaluation framework for AI continuity. arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.06710 , 2026.
